[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 10101000 3
6 00000001 1
7 10101100 4

01 10100000 2
12 00010001 2
23 11000100 3
34 00101010 3
45 10000000 1
56 01010000 2
67 10101000 3 match 5
70 01000001 2

71 01000000 1
